backtest.disclaimer: Based on real STX/BTC prices over the last 12 months. Past performance does not guarantee future results.

balance.noDataDesc: Portfolio data is not available yet. Check your assets or receive STX to start tracking real balances here.
balance.previewOnly: Preview only · Connect from the banner or topbar to load real balances, DCA plans, alerts, and activity.
balance.historyPending: Portfolio history will appear after balances load.

banner.title: Connect your wallet
banner.prop0: View your Stacks portfolio in real-time
banner.prop2: Track stacking rewards across PoX cycles
banner.prop3: Swap via Bitflow with one click

dcaSummary.title: DCA Plans
dcaSummary.emptyDesc: Set a recurring buy and let the keeper bot do the rest — no babysitting required.

social.unavailable: Live on-chain metrics are temporarily unavailable.
social.disclaimer: On-chain totals from both DCA vaults. USD volume uses current market prices and is hidden when a required source is unavailable.

recent.title: Recent Activity
recent.connectDesc: Your swaps, transfers, and DCA executions will show up here in real time.
recent.emptyDesc: Your first swap, transfer, or DCA execution will appear here.

trade.limitDesc: Auto-buy sBTC when the price drops to your target.
trade.migrationDesc: Upgrade to native Circle USDC on Stacks
trade.routingDesc: Routes swaps through Bitflow Pools using live on-chain quotes, with slippage protection enforced by the contract.
trade.yieldDesc: Fees go directly to liquidity providers — no inflationary token rewards.
trade.tip1: Set slippage to 0.5% for most swaps. Increase to 1% for low-liquidity tokens.
trade.tip2: sBTC → USDCx routes automatically multi-hop through STX and aeUSDC — the path is fixed, you don't pick it.
trade.tip3: Check your HealthScore on the Assets tab to see which tokens to rebalance.
trade.tip4: Large trades may have higher price impact — consider splitting into smaller swaps.

swap.errExpired: Quote expired — refreshing price, please try again.

dca.title: DCA Vault
dca.connectTitle: Connect your wallet to get started
dca.connectDesc: Connect a Leather or Xverse wallet to create and manage your DCA plans.

hero.subtitleIn: Automatically buy sBTC on a schedule with STX · Powered by Bitflow
hero.subtitleOut: Automatically sell sBTC for USDCx on a schedule · Powered by Bitflow

stats.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to see your active plans and next swap.

info.inDcaDesc: Spread your risk by buying tokens on a fixed schedule, regardless of price fluctuations.
info.inFeeDesc: 0.3% of each swap goes to the treasury. The remaining 99.7% is used to purchase sBTC via Bitflow.
info.inCustodyDesc: STX is held directly in the smart contract. Purchased tokens are sent straight to your wallet.
info.outDcaDesc: Gradually sell sBTC for USDCx on a fixed schedule to lock in value over time.
info.outFeeDesc: 0.3% of each swap goes to the treasury. The remaining 99.7% is swapped via the 3-hop Bitflow route.
info.outSwapDesc: sBTC → STX → aeUSDC → USDCx. All swaps are routed through Bitflow pools automatically.

form.heading: Create DCA Plan
form.submittedHint: Plan will appear after the transaction is confirmed (~1-2 min). Click refresh to update.
form.limitReached: Plan limit reached ({max}). Cancel an old plan first.
form.depositGteSwap: Initial deposit must be ≥ amount per swap
form.submittedToast: DCA plan submitted — waiting for confirmation

plans.noPlansDesc: Create your first DCA plan on the left to start auto-buying sBTC.

smart.unavailable: Smart DCA (buy the dip) is available on STX→sBTC plans.

smart.thresholdLabel: Buy only when 1 STX gets ≥ this % more sats than the {days}-day average
smart.maxDeferLabel: Max checks to skip before buying at market

card.swapsLeft: {count, plural, one {# swap} other {# swaps}} left
card.lowBalanceTitle: Only {count, plural, one {# swap} other {# swaps}} of funding left. There is no top-up action — create a new plan to continue.
card.cancelConfirm: Are you sure? You will be refunded {amount} STX.

overview.topUpHint: Top up at least {amount} more STX, then resume to add funds.
overview.resumeHint: Resume the plan to add funds.

execute.paused: Plan is paused. Resume from the Overview tab.
execute.nextIn: Next in ~{count, plural, one {# block} other {# blocks}}.
execute.invalidContract: Not a valid contract id (e.g. SP….contract-name).
execute.customRouterWarn: Custom router — executions through unverified contracts can drain your swap. Only use if you know the contract.

history.noExecutionsDesc: Swaps will appear here once the keeper runs this plan.

common.connectTitle: Connect your wallet to view performance
common.swapsAnalyzed: {count, plural, one {# swap} other {# swaps}} analyzed
common.acrossPlans: across {count, plural, one {# plan} other {# plans}}

in.connectDesc: Connect to see cost basis and execution history for all your DCA plans.
in.noExecDesc: Your plans haven't been executed by the keeper bot yet. Performance metrics will appear once the first swap completes.
in.basisVsSpotInfo: Compares your weighted-avg STX per sBTC across all executed swaps against the current STX/sBTC rate (BTC USD / STX USD). Positive % means you got more sBTC per STX than today's spot would give you.
in.basisVsSpotAria: About: Your basis vs today's spot
in.spotLine: Spot: 1 sBTC = {spot} STX · Your avg: {avg} STX
in.dcaVsLumpInfo: For each plan, we look up the STX-USD and BTC-USD closing prices on the day of that plan's first execution and ask: if you had dumped the same total STX-in into sBTC on day 0 at the then-spot rate, how much sBTC would you hold? The delta shows whether DCA beat or trailed that counterfactual buy. Excludes plans where historical prices couldn't be fetched.
in.lumpSummary: Across {count, plural, one {# plan} other {# plans}} · actual {actual} sBTC vs lump {lump} sBTC
in.lumpExcluded: {count, plural, one {# plan} other {# plans}} excluded — historical price unavailable
in.lumpUnavailableDesc: Historical STX/BTC prices for your plan start dates couldn't be fetched from CoinGecko. The basis-vs-today's-spot strip above still works.

out.connectDesc: Connect to see your sBTC→USDCx sell history.
out.noPlansDesc: DCA Out converts sBTC back into USDCx on a schedule. Useful for taking profit or scheduled exits.
out.noExecDesc: Your DCA Out plans haven't been executed by the keeper bot yet.
out.sellVsSpot: Your sell rate vs today's spot
out.sellVsSpotInfo: Weighted-avg USDCx received per sBTC across executions vs current sBTC→USDCx rate (BTC USD, since USDCx ≈ $1). Positive % means you sold at better-than-current rates.
out.sellVsSpotAria: About: Your sell rate vs today's spot
out.stxNoPlansDesc: STX Out converts STX into USDCx on a schedule.
out.stxNoExecDesc: Your STX→USDCx plans haven't been executed by the keeper bot yet.
out.stxSellVsSpot: Your sell rate vs today's spot
out.stxSellVsSpotInfo: Weighted-avg USDCx received per STX across executions vs current STX price (since USDCx ≈ $1). Positive % means you sold at better-than-current rates.
out.stxSellVsSpotAria: About: Your STX sell rate vs today's spot

chart.title: Cost basis over time
chart.need2: Need at least 2 executions on different days for a meaningful cost-basis chart.
chart.pricesUnavailable: Historical STX/BTC prices unavailable — chart can't be drawn.

chartOut.title: Sell rate over time
chartOut.need2: Need at least 2 executions on different days for a meaningful sell-rate chart.
chartOut.pricesUnavailable: Historical BTC prices unavailable — chart can't be drawn.
chartOut.legendBasis: Your running avg sell rate ({token} per sBTC)

summary.connectDesc: Connect your wallet to view your net worth and asset allocation.

health.title: Portfolio Health Score
health.connectMsg: Connect your wallet to see your health score
health.cNone: No volatile assets — no concentration risk
health.cWellSpread: {pct}% in top volatile asset — well spread
health.aNone: No volatile assets — portfolio is fully in stablecoins
health.tipNoVolatile: Your portfolio is {pct}% stablecoins with no volatile assets. Consider deploying into Stacks ecosystem tokens like STX, ALEX, or Velar.
health.tipMostlyStable: {pct}% of your portfolio is in stablecoins. A large cash position is safe but limits growth exposure.
health.tipExtremeConc: {pct}% of your volatile allocation is in {token}. Even small positions in 2–3 other Stacks tokens would significantly reduce concentration risk.
health.tipOneAsset: You hold only 1 volatile asset ({token}). Adding 2–3 more Stacks ecosystem tokens (e.g. ALEX, sBTC, Velar) would improve your score quickly.
health.tipHighConc: {token} makes up {pct}% of your volatile portfolio. Gradually rebalancing into other assets could lower your concentration risk.
health.tipNoStable: No stablecoin reserve detected. Holding 5–15% in a stablecoin like USDCx provides a buffer during market downturns.
health.tipHealthy: Your portfolio shows healthy diversification across the Stacks ecosystem. Keep maintaining a balanced allocation.
health.tipDefault: Consider gradually rebalancing volatile assets to spread weight more evenly and maintain a stablecoin reserve.

holdings.title: Token Holdings
holdings.noTokensDesc: Connect your wallet or fund it with STX to see your token holdings here.
holdings.flaggedToggle: {count, plural, one {# flagged token} other {# flagged tokens}} (spam / unverified)
holdings.suspiciousTitle: This token has no registered metadata. It may be a spam airdrop or scam token. Do not interact unless you trust the source.
holdings.unverifiedTitle: This token is not listed in any known price feed. It may be legitimate but unverified. Exercise caution.
holdings.bannerSuspicious: {count, plural, one {# suspicious token} other {# suspicious tokens}} detected — likely spam airdrops with no registered metadata.
holdings.bannerUnverified: {count, plural, one {# unverified token} other {# unverified tokens}} found with no price data.
holdings.bannerWarn: Do not interact with unknown tokens unless you trust the source.

perf.title: Portfolio Performance
perf.connectDesc: Connect your wallet to record net-worth history. Tracking begins on your first visit.
perf.notEnough: Not enough history yet — net worth is recorded each time you visit. Check back in an hour for your first data point.

yield.disclaimer: APY estimates are indicative — actual rewards vary with cycle, pool depth, and market conditions.

yield.stackingDesc: Stake STX for liquid stSTX — earn stacking yield with no lockup.
yield.sbtcDesc: Provide sBTC to DEX pools (Bitflow / ALEX) to earn swap fees. Variable.
yield.dcaDesc: Average into sBTC/USDC on a schedule. Returns depend on price action.

stake.nudgeBody: Stake it as stSTX to earn ~{apy}% with no lockup.

yield.stStxDesc: stSTX accrues PoX rewards automatically — its claim on STX grows each cycle.
yield.sbtcDesc: sBTC isn't yield-bearing on its own — supplying it to a DEX pool earns swap fees.

apps.title: Connected Apps
apps.intro: DeFi protocols and contracts you have interacted with on Stacks, based on your 50 most recent transactions.
apps.connectPrompt: Connect your wallet to see your app history

explore.stackingdao: Stake STX and receive stSTX, a liquid token earning stacking rewards
explore.lisa: Stake STX and receive LiSTX while keeping liquidity
explore.zest: Supply assets to earn yield or borrow against your crypto
explore.arkadiko: Mint USDA stablecoin by locking STX as collateral
explore.bitflow: Swap tokens on Stacks with low fees
explore.alex: Trade, lend, and borrow across Stacks DeFi
explore.velar: Swap and provide liquidity on Stacks

unknown.unverifiedTitle: Contract not recognized as a known DeFi protocol

hero.subtitle: Turn STX into sBTC on a schedule you control. Every DCA execution is non-custodial, enforced on-chain, and can be paused or cancelled from your wallet.

walkthrough.heading: From recurring buy to portfolio insight
walkthrough.intro: StacksPort connects automation, execution, and measurement without taking custody of your wallet.

automate.title: Build an STX to sBTC schedule
automate.description: Choose an amount and interval, review the full plan, and approve it from your wallet. The vault holds only the balance allocated to that plan.

measure.title: Track cost basis and plan runway
measure.description: See portfolio value, DCA execution history, average entry price, and the number of scheduled swaps your remaining balance can support.

act.title: Swap directly and stay informed
act.description: Use Bitflow routes for direct swaps, then monitor price targets and DCA executions without watching the dashboard all day.

alertsPreview.execDesc: Your scheduled STX to sBTC swap was confirmed on Stacks.

s1.title: Connect your wallet
s1.desc: Use Leather or Xverse. No seed phrases shared — your keys never leave your device.

s2.title: Create a DCA plan
s2.desc: Pick a token pair, set your amount and interval. Deposit STX or sBTC as collateral.

s3.title: Let the bot execute
s3.desc: Our keeper bot runs via GitHub Actions and executes your plan on-chain at every interval. Pause or cancel anytime.

trust.heading: Built for transparent automation
trust.intro: The automation runs through open-source contracts deployed on Stacks mainnet. Review the rules and live contract activity before connecting a wallet.

control.title: You keep control
control.desc: Wallet approval is required for deposits and plan changes. StacksPort never receives your seed phrase or private key.

automated.title: Automated on-chain
automated.desc: A keeper submits due executions, while the vault contracts enforce plan balances, intervals, and swap accounting.

pause.title: Pause or cancel
pause.desc: Plans remain under your wallet's control. Pause future executions or cancel and withdraw the remaining vault balance.

fees.title: Transparent fees
fees.desc: Each automated swap charges a 0.3% protocol fee. Network and DEX execution costs are separate.

cta.subtitle: Choose an amount and interval, review the 0.3% protocol fee, then approve the plan from your Stacks wallet.

footer.tagline: Non-custodial DCA automation and portfolio management on Stacks blockchain.

bubbles.title: Crypto Bubbles
bubbles.stacksNote: Showing Stacks tokens with a CoinGecko price feed · DEX-only tokens not included
bubbles.watchlistEmpty: Your watchlist is empty. Tap the ⭐ on any bubble to add it.
bubbles.holdingsEmptyTracked: None of your holdings are among the tracked tokens.
bubbles.holdingsConnect: Connect your wallet to see your holdings as bubbles.

alert.pushPrompt: Enable notifications to get alerts even when the app is closed
